local_validation.notes: The focused shared native representation proof passed with result 30000. The multi-domain runtime capsule proof now includes BML alongside Python, TypeScript, Go, Rust, natural, image, audio, video, and document dialects and passed with result 35100. Existing BML action/thesis proof band passed with result 1073741840. Full Form validation passed with 216 ok, 0 divergent. After the continuity-gate fix merged to main, normal make prompt-guide passed in this dirty continuation worktree with blocking_risk_count=0.

deploy_validation.notes: Production verification is pending until this branch is pushed, reviewed, merged, and deployed.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: BML can now participate in the same bmf-dialect/runtime-capsule/native-representation path already used by Python and other grammar capsules, with BML source-originated return-int lowering into native BMA execution.

phase_gate.notes: Local proof is complete for the shared-native slice; CI, merge, and production deploy verification remain pending.

evidence_refs: BML now exposes bml-bmf-section, bml-bmf-native-section, and bml-bmf-dialect through the same bmf-dialect structure used by Python.
Python's native registry now includes pybmf-emit-assign-int and pybmf-emit-return-int, aligning the manifest with runtime capsule examples and reversible return-int proof.
runtime-shared-native-representation-band.fk proves two different language grammars share the same runtime registry/capsule request path for parse and reverse emit.
runtime-real-grammar-capsules-band.fk now includes BML in the shared registry with Python, TypeScript, Go, Rust, natural-language, image, audio, video, and document grammars.
The same proof lowers the BML parsed object into a BMA program and runs it through native execution to return 13.
runtime_shared_native_representation_20260601.md records the reusable contract for future grammar ingestion across TypeScript, C#, Java, media, documents, and other domains.
